fields.name: Description
fields.default: Organize is a system to keep your desk tidy and photo-worthy all day long. Procrastinate your work while you meticulously arrange items into dedicated trays.

default.label: Material
default.value: Solid walnut base with rare earth magnets and polycarbonate add-ons.

default.label: Finish
default.value: Hand sanded and finished with natural oil

default.label: Includes
default.value: Pen Tray, Phone Tray, Small Tray, Large Tray, Sticky Note Holder

default.label: Considerations
default.value: Made from natural materials. Grain and color vary with each item.
